title: n8n Error Handling: Building Self-Healing Automation Pipelines

resources.title: Build an error notification + retry workflow

resources.command: # In n8n: Set Error Workflow in workflow settings → Add Error Trigger node → Connect IF node (retries < 3) → Retry OR send Slack alert
